IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: IN CONJUNCTION WITH RELATED ORGANIZATIONS, MIDPEN HOUSING CORPORATION'S MISSION IS TO PROVIDE SAFE, AFFORDABLE HOUSING OF HIGH QUALITY TO THOSE IN NEED; TO ESTABLISH STABILITY AND OPPORTUNITY IN THE LIVES OF RESIDENTS; AND TO FOSTER DIVERSE COMMUNITIES THAT ALLOW PEOPLE FROM ALL ETHNIC, SOCIAL AND ECONOMIC BACKGROUNDS TO LIVE IN DIGNITY, HARMONY, AND MUTUAL RESPECT.
IRS990.MissionDesc: IN CONJUNCTION WITH RELATED ORGANIZATIONS, MIDPEN HOUSING CORPORATION'S MISSION IS TO PROVIDE SAFE, AFFORDABLE HOUSING OF HIGH QUALITY TO THOSE IN NEED; TO ESTABLISH STABILITY AND OPPORTUNITY IN THE LIVES OF RESIDENTS; AND TO FOSTER DIVERSE COMMUNITIES THAT ALLOW PEOPLE FROM ALL ETHNIC, SOCIAL AND ECONOMIC BACKGROUNDS TO LIVE IN DIGNITY, HARMONY, AND MUTUAL RESPECT.
IRS990.Desc: THE CORPORATION DEVELOPS AND OPERATES SAFE AND AFFORDABLE HOUSING OF HIGH QUALITY FOR LOW- AND VERY-LOW INCOME INDIVIDUALS AND FAMILIES, INCLUDING ELDERLY AND DISABLED PERSONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION LOANED $980,000 TO A THIRD PARTY AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTION FUND AND WAS RECORDED AS A NOTE RECEIVABLE IN 2023. THE LOAN IS FORGIVABLE AT THE ORGANIZATION'S DISCRETION. IN 2024, THE LOAN WAS FORGIVEN AND IS INCLUDED ON FORM 990 PART IX LINE 11D.

THE CORPORATION BELIEVES THAT IT HAS APPROPRIATE SUPPORT FOR ANY TAX POSITIONS TAKEN, AND AS SUCH, DOES NOT HAVE ANY UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS THAT ARE MATERIAL TO THE COMBINED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS. THE FEDERAL AND STATE INCOME TAX RETURNS FOR THE YEARS 2020 THROUGH 2023 ARE SUBJECT TO EXAMINATION BY REGULATORY AGENCIES, GENERALLY FOR THREE YEARS AND FOUR YEARS AFTER THEY WERE FILED FOR FEDERAL AND STATE, RESPECTIVELY.

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: HOUSING LEADERSHIP COUNCIL OF SAN MATEO
NON PROFIT HOUSING ASSOCIATIONS OF NORTHERN CA

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: RELATED TO FAIR HAVEN COMMONS CA ENERGY COMMISSION BUILD GRANT
RELATED TO IRAN D. HALL DEV FEE CONTRIBUTION

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MONITORS THE USE OF GRANTS AS PART OF OUR MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, AND ANNUAL FINANCIAL STATEMENT REVIEW PROCESS.

COMPENSATION SURVEY OR STUDY AND FORM 990 OF OTHER ORGANIZATIONS WERE USED TO ESTABLISH COMPENSATION OF RELATED ORGANIZATION'S CEO/CFO, OFFICERS AND KEY EMPLOYEES. BOARD OF COMPENSATION COMMITTEE'S APPROVAL IS ALSO REQUIRED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART I, LINE 1, MOST SIGNIFICANT ACTIVITIES DURING 2024:
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PROPERTIES PLACED IN SERVICE IN 2024: KIKU CROSSING (FORMERLY DOWNTOWN SAN MATEO) 225 UNITS, 414 N PETALUMA 40 UNITS, CIENEGA HEIGHTS (FORMERLY PIPPIN PHASE II) 80 UNITS, SPARROW TERRACE (FORMERLY MILES LANE) 72 UNITS, FOOD LOK EAST 124 UNITS, MAHONIA GLEN 99 UNITS, SHIRLEY CHISHOLM VILLAGE - LIHTC 35 UNITS AND SHIRLEY CHISHOLM VILLAGE - MODERATE 100 UNITS (TEACHERS HOUSING). PROPERTIES IN CONSTRUCTION DURING 2024: JESSIE STREET 50 UNITS, SAN ANDREAS REHAB 43 UNITS, SHERWOOD OAKS REHAB 80 UNITS, COLIBRI COMMONS (965 WEEKS EAST PALO ALTO) 136 UNITS, IRA D. HALL SQUARE(1178 SONORA COURT) 176 UNITS AND OAK GARDENS (VA MENLO PARK) 62 UNITS. PROPERTIES PLANNED IN 2024 AND WILL START CONSTRUCTION IN 2025: GOLDEN GATE AVENUE PHASE I 75 UNITS, CASA ROSELAND 75 UNITS, MIDWAY VILLAGE PHASE 2 113 UNITS, SUMMER OAKS 72 UNITS, CYPRESS POINT 71 UNITS, LAZULI LANDING 81 UNITS AND TURK STREET 92 UNITS. PROPERTIES PLANNED IN 2024 AND WILL START CONSTRUCTION IN 2026 AND BEYOND: VTA CAPITOL 203 UNITS, 1580 MAPLE STREET 110 UNITS, SANDPIPER PLACE (NAPA PIPE PHASE 1) 85 UNITS, RESHAP - APC APARTMENTS 92 UNITS, WOOD STREET 85 UNITS, MIDWAY VILLAGE III AND IV 280 UNITS, RESHAP-BRWC BESSIE COLEMAN COURT 74 UNITS, NAPA PIPE PHASE II 57 UNITS, PENINSULA WELLNESS COMMUNITY 152 UNITS, GOLDEN GATE AVENUE PHASE II 96 UNITS, OSGOOD RD PHASE I AND PHASE II (IRVINGTON BART) 229 UNITS, CAPITOLA MANOR 52 UNITS, MADISON STREET 42 UNITS, WATSONVILLE METRO 61 UNITS, 578 GREEN VALLEY 61 UNITS, S. MATHILDA AVENUE 124 UNITS, WASHINGTON COMMONS 50 UNITS, 1171 SONORA COURT 172 UNITS, 609 PRICE AVENUE (TISHMAN SPEYER) 98 UNITS, METZGAR 50 UNITS, PICKERING PLACE & OROYSOM 103 UNITS, HARBOR VILLAGE 86 UNITS, AND STARDUST GARDENS 80 UNITS.

THE CORPORATION HAS NO EMPLOYEES. SALARIES AND WAGES REPORTED IN PART IX, FUNCTIONAL EXPENSES WERE REIMBURSEMENTS TO MIDPEN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CORPORATION. THE AMOUNT WAS LISTED TO CONFORM WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF FEDERAL AND/OR STATE REGULATORY AGENCIES AND/OR LENDERS ON AUDITED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE TAX ACCOUNTING MANAGER COMPLETES THE 990 QUESTIONNAIRE AND PULLS ALL SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION. THE QUESTIONNAIRE IS THEN SENT TO THE TAX PROFESSIONALS FOR THEIR PREPARATION OF THE TAX RETURNS. THE DRAFT 990 TAX RETURN GOES THROUGH THE REVIEW OF THE TAX ACCOUNTING MANAGER, ASSISTANT CONTROLLERS OF CORPORATE AND DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTING, VP & CONTROLLER AND CFO. THE FINAL DRAFT 990 TAX RETURN IS FURNISHED TO THE CEO/PRESIDENT AND SUBSEQUENTLY TO THE AUDIT COMMITTEE FOR THEIR REVIEW AND APPROVAL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A CONFLICT OF INTEREST DISCLOSURE QUESTIONNAIRE IS SUBMITTED ANNUALLY TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND KEY EMPLOYEES, WHO COMPLETE AND RETURN THE FORMS DISCLOSING ANY CONDITIONS OF CONFLICT OF INTEREST. THE DISCLOSURES ARE REVIEWED BY THE CORPORATE COUNSEL AND THE CFO. A SUMMARY OF THE DISCLOSURES IS PRESENTED TO THE GOVERNANCE COMMITTEE, WHICH ASSESSES IF ANY CONFLICT OF INTEREST ACTUALLY EXISTS. ANY CONDITIONS WHICH WARRANT ELEVATION TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS IS ON A CASE-BY-CASE BASIS. AS OF THE REPORTING DATE, THERE HAS BEEN NO REPORTABLE CONDITION OF CONFLICT OF INTEREST.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DATA FROM AN EXTERNAL COMPENSATION SURVEY IS REVIEWED AND DISCUSSED WITH THE BOD.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS ARE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST
THE ORGANIZATION LOANED $980,000 TO A THIRD PARTY AFFORDABLE HOUSING ACTION FUND AND WAS RECORDED AS A NOTE RECEIVABLE IN 2023. THE LOAN FORGIVENESS IS REPORTED ON FORM 990 PART IX IN 2024.
CONSOLIDATION OF MP MOSS BEACH HOMES LLC -10,230. CONSOLIDATION OF MP ROSELAND VILLAGE LLC -6,134. CONSOLIDATION OF MP IRVINGTON LLC -2,990. CONSOLIDATION OF MP TURK STREET LLC -4,083.
THE PROCESS OF OVERSEEING THE AUDIT AND SELECTING AN INDEPENDENT ACCOUNTANT HAS NOT CHANGED FROM THE PRIOR YEAR.
